title: Login Prevents Duplicate Submission While Loading State Is Active
description: Verifies that after clicking the Sign In button, the submit button is disabled and cannot be clicked again until the authentication response is received, preventing duplicate API requests.
expected_result: Immediately after clicking Sign In, the submit button transitions to a disabled state and a loading indicator is shown. The button remains disabled until the server responds. On success, the user is redirected to /dashboard, confirming no duplicate submission occurred.

test_steps.action: Verify the submit button is enabled before clicking
test_steps.expected: Submit button is enabled and ready to click

test_steps.action: Click the Submit / Sign In button
test_steps.expected: Form is submitted and loading indicator appears

test_steps.action: Immediately verify the submit button is disabled during loading
test_steps.expected: Submit button is disabled during the loading/pending state

test_steps.action: Wait for redirect to confirm login succeeded after loading resolves
test_steps.expected: User is redirected to /dashboard confirming successful authentication
